title: rubus × acarpus
intro: Rubus × acarpus, also known as the black raspberry, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the rose family and is a cross between the black raspberry and the thimbleberry. The medicinal properties of Rubus × acarpus include its high content of antioxidants, anthocyanins, and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × acarpus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus × acarpus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is often consumed fresh as a fruit or added to smoothies and baked goods.
